message.content:
Deep comparison of MyOrdersRewardProgram screen between original and migrated code.

## Instructions
1. First checkout the original branch: cd /Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place && git checkout feature/SPMAIS-32275_

2. Compare these files:
   - `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/index.tsx`
     vs `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/index.tsx`
   
   - `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx`
     vs `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/view.tsx`
   
   - `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-card-place/src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts`
     vs `/Users/anotonio.silva/dev/rnm-app-fintech-rewardprogram/src/screens/MyOrdersRewardProgram/models/index.ts`

3. For each file, compare:
   - Imports
   - Component logic
   - JSX structure
   - Props and types

4. Report ALL differences with line numbers and impact assessment.

This is the orders list screen that navigates to order details.

input.description: Checkout original branch in card-place repo
